sections.paragraph:
f. an arid, sterile region, a desert (see the root No. IV), Job 24:5 Isa 33:9 35:1 51:3 Jer 50:12 51:43 . With the art., הָעֲרָבָה is that low region into which the valley of the Jordan (الغور) runs near Jericho, and which extends as far as the Ælanitic gulf, Deu 1:1 2:8 Jos 12:1 2Sa 4:7 2Ki 25:4 in which are the Dead Sea (hence called יָם הָעֲרָבָה the sea of the desert, Deu 4:49 Jos 3:16 12:3 2Ki 14:25) and the brook Kedron, or נַחַל הָעֲרָבָה the stream of the desert, Amo 6:14 comp. 2Ki 14:25, also עַרְבֹות יְרֵחֹו the plains of Jericho, Jos 5:10 2Ki 25:5 and עַרְבֹות מֹואָב, see מֹואָב .

(2) pr.n. of a town in the tribe of Benjamin, fully called בֵּית הָעֲרָבָה; see בַּיִת , letter kk .
